title: PCR/qPCR prep: distribution of patient samples to 384-well plates
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol automates the distribution of patient samples to the wells of up to three 384-well plates in a specific arrangement shown in the attached plate map. The number of columns filled with patient sample for each plate can be specified (as a single comma-separated string of values between 1 and 12 like "8,8,12") in the parameters below. Links: * [PCR/qPCR prep: distribution of primers to 384-well plates](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/559aa0) * [plate map](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2021-03-08/e373l2s/384%20plate%20map.png) * [Opentrons P20-multi channel electronic pipettes (GEN2)](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-robot/products/8-channel-electronic-pipette) * [Opentrons 20ul Filter Tips](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-20ul-filter-tips)
steps_raw: This protocol automates the distribution of patient samples to the wells of up to three 384-well plates in a specific arrangement shown in the attached plate map. The number of columns filled with patient sample for each plate can be specified (as a single comma-separated string of values between 1 and 12 like "8,8,12") in the parameters below. Links: * [PCR/qPCR prep: distribution of primers to 384-well plates](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/559aa0) * [plate map](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2021-03-08/e373l2s/384%20plate%20map.png) * [Opentrons P20-multi channel electronic pipettes (GEN2)](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-robot/products/8-channel-electronic-pipette) * [Opentrons 20ul Filter Tips](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-20ul-filter-tips)

Choose the number of patient sample plates, the number of columns filled with patient sample for each plate, and your 384-well plate labware, and the pipette disposal volume if any (default is set to 1 ul) using the parameters below.
Upload your protocol into the OT App.
Set up your deck according to the deck map below.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support article.
